title: Madurai - A 2500 year old city
summary: Located on the banks of the Vaigai river, this city is steeped in Tamil history, literature, and tradition.
transport: Visited Madurai to attend a family function. Drove from Coimbatore with family members. Road condition was fairly good.
stay: Stayed in a Guest House in SS Colony.
tips: from mid-March. Plenty of local food restaurants available. If one wants to enjoy the local delicacies
one should venture eating in local restaurants
often known as "Mess" instead of big restaurants. Definitely worth trying "Acharya Bhavan" in SS Colony !
